name: autonexus
description: AutoNexus — autonomous goal-directed iteration engine with Obsidian as knowledge backbone. Inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch.

plugins.name: autonexus
plugins.description: Autonomous iteration engine with Obsidian MCP integration. /autonexus runs an unlimited modify-verify-keep/discard loop with Obsidian reads/writes every iteration. Includes /autonexus:plan (goal wizard) and /autonexus:predict (multi-persona swarm with persona notes in Obsidian).
